title: LeoTweaks Horse Heads
description:
Makes horse heads transparent for better visibility. Useful for Spear PVP!
No Mods required.
body:
### This Resourcepack makes all Horse Heads transparent, whilst still maintaining their outline, to improve visibility whilst riding horses.

---
Very useful for Horse riding, PVP, Jousting, Spear, Bowing, and Horse hitboxes in general!

![First person view of riding a horse with the Resource pack applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54d89e2a5611c9ff13ce7f1ff330b9eaf4648db2_0.webp)
